message:
fix(forms): initialize ConfirmDialog test with selected_yes=true

The render test for ConfirmDialog used ConfirmDialogState::default()
which starts with selected_yes=false. Set selected_yes=true explicitly
so the test validates the expected "Yes selected" rendering state rather
than the default "No selected" state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
